name: @streetraceing/farsight
description: Analyze dependency freshness, source lines, project type, and Git activity.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node -e "require('node:fs').chmodSync('dist/bin/farsight.js', 0o755)"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run pack:check
